# Bug Report

## Summary
> Provide a clear, direct description of the issue  
> Avoid vague statements

---

## Reproduction Steps
> Must be precise and repeatable

1.

## Expected Behaviour
> What should happen

---

> What is happening instead

---

## Evidence
> Screenshots, logs, or recordings  
> Paste links or attach files

---

- Browser:
- OS:
- Extension Version:

---

## Impact Assessment

- [ ] Blocks usage completely  
- [ ] Affects core functionality  
- [ ] Minor issue  

Workaround (if any):

---

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Issue is reproducible  
- [ ] Not a duplicate  
- [ ] Steps are complete
